elements.prompt: A high-resolution 3D render of a water molecule (H2O) with vibrant blue oxygen and white hydrogen atoms, wearing a small gold shiny badge that says 'World's Best Solvent', cinematic lighting, dark research-mode background, 8k resolution.

elements.text: You are 70% water, 100% curious, and about to discover why the most common molecule on Earth is actually a physical anomaly.
